name: Kth Smallest and Largest element in BST
statement:
Given the root node of a binary search tree (BST) and an integer k.


Return the kth smallest and largest value (1-indexed) of all values of the nodes in the tree.


Return the 1st integer as kth smallest and 2nd integer as kth largest in the returned array.
constraints:
• The number of nodes in the tree is n.
  • 1 <= k <= n <= 104
  • 0 <= Node.val <= 105

examples.explanation: The 1st smallest value in given BST is 1. The 1st largest value in given BST is 4.
The 3rd smallest value in given BST is 3. The 3rd largest value in given BST is 3.
